title: Rebuild is a continuation from EoE
display_title: Rebuild is a continuation from EoE
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild is a continuation from EoE Post by PR3D4T0R » Sun Dec 04, 2011 4:27 am I don't know if this has already been mentioned here, but I just saw this image and mind blown

[]: A dead horse really. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Dec 04, 2011 4:55 am Search Function is your friend, the thread most notable for this topic would be: The Sequel Theory Thread Just going off the top of my head, the "this time" statement is shown many times to be a translation error, the ocean being red is just a stylistic choice for demonstrating how destructive 2nd impact was, and there are other possible meanings for "27", such as merely going beyond what the original showed (and Evangelion itself "breaking").

chunks.content:
Article: Rebuild is a continuation from EoE
[]: Rebuild is a continuation from EoE Post by PR3D4T0R » Sun Dec 04, 2011 4:27 am I don't know if this has already been mentioned here, but I just saw this image and mind blown

[]: A dead horse really. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Dec 04, 2011 4:55 am Search Function is your friend, the thread most notable for this topic would be: The Sequel Theory Thread Just going off the top of my head, the "this time" statement is shown many times to be a translation error, the ocean being red is just a stylistic choice for demonstrating how destructive 2nd impact was, and there are other possible meanings for "27", such as merely going beyond what the original showed (and Evangelion itself "breaking").
